title: Washing machine full of evidence: 19 plead guilty in Florida gang-affiliated defrauding scheme

summary: City of Gulfport is working to make it safer for people who walk in the area, including along the new Discover Gulfport walking trails.

title: Lawmakers cast doubt on Kathryn Ruemmler's testimony about Epstein ties

title: Screen time cut: Hillsborough schools capping digital learning programs for K-2 students
summary: Hillsborough County Public Schools is pulling younger students away from classroom laptops by capping screen time and removing major digital learning platforms from daily lessons starting this school year.

title: Florida company offers membership for evacuation flights this hurricane season
summary: A Florida company is offering residents a new way to evacuate storms this hurricane season by selling memberships that guarantee seats on its evacuation flights out of the Tampa (TPA) and Sarasota (SRQ) airports.

title: New claims of human rights violations center on Texas ICE detention camp
summary: A new report by Human Rights Watch and the ACLU accuses the U.S. government of beatings, denied medical care, and cutting detainees off from lawyers at a Texas ICE lockup.

title: ZooTampa celebrates America’s 250th birthday with month-long celebration
summary: Red, White, and Zoo runs all July at ZooTampa at Lowry Park. The event features themed animal enrichment activities, festive food, drinks, and merchandise.

title: Pinellas schools pause new athletic contracts with St. Petersburg Catholic
summary: Pinellas County Schools has temporarily stopped public high schools from scheduling new athletic competitions against St. Petersburg Catholic High School, Pinellas County district officials confirmed Wednesday.

title: 'It is your responsibility': Gun safety advocates on Kentucky's new concealed carry law
summary: A newly passed law will allow Kentuckians ages 18 to 20 to obtain a provisional concealed carry license. Gun safety experts say training and responsibility are essential.

title: Nurse practitioner offers produce safety tips during Cyclosporiasis outbreak
summary: Right now, it is still unclear what the official source or sources are of the current Cyclosporiasis outbreak. In the past, outbreaks have been linked to bagged salad mixes, raspberries, basil, cilantro, and snow peas.

title: Argentina surges past England with late goals to win 2-1 and advance to World Cup final
summary: Defending champion Argentina rallied to beat England 2-1 on Wednesday and reach the World Cup final.
